name: Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray baking sheet with non-stick spray.
2. Stir together flour, baking powder, and lemon peel in a bowl; set aside.
3. In another bowl, beat butter until creamy. Add sugar, then fluff the mixture with an electric mixer. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture alternately with the anise extract (or crushed anise seeds). Stir just until combined.
5. Shape the dough into four 12-inch long logs on wax paper.
6. Flatten the logs slightly.
7. Bake at 375°F for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned and firm to the touch.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack for about one hour.
9. Cut each log into half-inch slices.
10. Arrange the slices cut-side down on the prepared baking sheet.
11. Bake at 300°F for 10-15 minutes, turning once halfway through, until crisp and dry.
